description: Integrate multiple LLM API providers into VS Code's GitHub Copilot Chat using the Language Model API.

configuration.commitMessageGeneration.en: Controls whether commit message generation buttons are shown in the Source Control view.
configuration.title: Unify Chat Provider
configuration.verbose.description: Enable verbose logging of requests and responses.
configuration.storeApiKeyInSettings.desc:
Store sync-safe sensitive data (e.g., API keys) in settings.json instead of VS Code Secret Storage.

OAuth credentials are always kept in Secret Storage to avoid multi-device token refresh conflicts.

DANGER: Changing this setting will migrate existing data between storage locations (may expose secrets in plain text).
configuration.balanceRefreshIntervalMs.d: Periodic refresh interval for provider balances in milliseconds. Default: 60000 (60 seconds).
configuration.balanceThrottleWindowMs.de: Throttle window for post-request balance refresh in milliseconds. Default: 10000 (10 seconds).
configuration.balanceStatusBarIcon.descr: Status bar icon for provider balances. Set to empty to hide.
configuration.displayBalanceInConfigurat: Display refreshed provider balance information in the model configuration button area. This is display-only and does not affect requests.
configuration.usageDetailRetentionDays.d: Number of days to keep detailed usage records. Older records are folded into historical totals so overall usage remains accurate. Default: 100.
configuration.balanceWarning.enabled.des: Show a warning icon next to model names when nearing configured balance thresholds.
configuration.balanceWarning.timeThresho: Time threshold in days for expiration warnings (supports decimals). Default: 1.
configuration.balanceWarning.amountThres: Balance amount threshold for warnings (unitless; currency ignored). Default: 1.
configuration.balanceWarning.tokenThresh: Token remaining threshold in millions for warnings. Default: 1.
configuration.networkSettings.descriptio: Global network settings. Timeout and retry affect chat requests; proxy affects provider HTTP requests.
configuration.networkSettings.timeout.co: TCP connection timeout in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.timeout.re: Maximum time between SSE data chunks in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.retry.maxR: Maximum number of retry attempts for chat requests.
configuration.networkSettings.retry.init: Initial retry delay in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.retry.maxD: Maximum retry delay cap in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.retry.back: Backoff multiplier for exponential retry delay (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.retry.jitt: Jitter factor (0-1) to randomize retry delay (chat requests).
configuration.networkSettings.retry.stat: HTTP status codes that should trigger retries for chat requests. When set, this overrides the default retryable status codes.
configuration.networkSettings.proxy.desc: Global proxy settings for provider requests.
configuration.proxy.type.enumDescription: Use VS Code HTTP proxy settings.
Connect directly without using a proxy.
Use the custom proxy URL configured here.
configuration.proxy.url.description: Custom proxy URL. Supports http, https, socks4, socks4a, socks5, and socks5h.
configuration.proxy.authorization.descri: Optional proxy authorization header or user:password credentials.
configuration.proxy.strictSSL.descriptio: Whether to enforce TLS certificate validation for proxied requests. When unset, VS Code's http.proxyStrictSSL setting is used.
configuration.proxy.noProxy.description: Hosts that should bypass the proxy.
configuration.commitMessageGeneration.mo: Model selection used for commit message generation.
Vendor identifier of the language model used for commit message generation.
Model identifier used for commit message generation.
configuration.commitMessageGeneration.fo: Commit message format used for commit message generation.
Infer the style from repository history; fall back to Conventional Commits.
Use a plain one-line commit message.
Remove the predefined format instructions and rely on custom instructions appended to the system prompt.
configuration.commitMessageGeneration.cu: Additional instructions appended to the commit message generation system prompt.
configuration.commitMessageGeneration.ex: VS Code glob patterns for files whose diffs should be omitted from commit message generation prompts.
configuration.endpoints.description:
List of LLM API provider endpoints. 

You usually do not need to edit this manually; prefer managing providers through the `Unify Chat Provider: Manage Providers` UI.
configuration.endpoints.type.description: API format type. Determines how requests are formatted.
configuration.endpoints.useRawBaseUrl.de: Whether to disable automatic URL normalization, including provider-specific URL handling such as appending /v1 or stripping suffixes.
Use Claude Relay Service balance monitor.
Optional transform for converting New API quota fields into balance amount.
Primary quota field name. Defaults to quota.
Additional quota-like fields to add to the primary quota, such as gift_quota.
Divisor used to convert raw quota to amount. Defaults to 500000.
Multiplier applied after division. Defaults to 1.
configuration.endpoints.contextCache.des: Context cache configuration (used by providers that support prompt caching).
configuration.endpoints.contextCache.typ: Whether to use context cache only when it's free ('only-free'), or also when it may incur cost ('allow-paid').
Use context cache only when it's free.
Use context cache even if it may incur cost.
configuration.endpoints.contextCache.ttl: Cache TTL in seconds. Leave empty to use the provider default TTL. Some providers may quantize this to supported TTL presets; paid presets may require 'allow-paid'.
configuration.endpoints.transport.descri: Preferred transport mode for this provider.
configuration.endpoints.serviceTier.desc: Default service tier for requests from this provider.
configuration.endpoints.serviceTier.enum: Let the provider auto-select the service tier.
Standard tier (maps to OpenAI "default" and Anthropic "standard_only").
Flex tier for OpenAI; Anthropic falls back to standard_only.
Scale tier for OpenAI; Anthropic falls back to standard_only.
Priority tier for OpenAI; Anthropic enables Fast mode.
configuration.endpoints.extraHeaders.des: Extra headers to include in requests. Header values support `${APIKEY}` to reference the provider credential.
configuration.endpoints.extraBody.descri: Extra body parameters to include in requests.
configuration.endpoints.timeout.connecti: TCP connection timeout in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.timeout.response: Maximum time between SSE data chunks in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.retry.descriptio: Retry settings for chat requests (per-provider override).
configuration.endpoints.retry.maxRetries: Maximum number of retry attempts for chat requests.
configuration.endpoints.retry.initialDel: Initial retry delay in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.retry.maxDelayMs: Maximum retry delay cap in milliseconds (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.retry.backoffMul: Backoff multiplier for exponential retry delay (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.retry.jitterFact: Jitter factor (0-1) to randomize retry delay (chat requests).
configuration.endpoints.proxy.descriptio: Proxy settings for this provider. Overrides global proxy settings.
configuration.endpoints.autoFetchOfficia: Automatically fetch and sync official models from the provider API.
configuration.endpoints.models.family.de: Model family (e.g., gpt-4, claude-3). Defaults to model ID.
configuration.endpoints.models.tokenizer: Tokenizer used for token counting in VS Code.
Alias of char4. The approximate algorithm used by VS Code officially (about 4 characters per token).

A conservative tokenizer based on UTF-8 bytes ensures that the model’s context limit is not exceeded, but it may trigger context compression more quickly due to significant deviations from actual token consumption.
The approximate algorithm used by VS Code officially (about 4 characters per token).
Tokenization powered by OpenAI tiktoken with model-aware encoding selection.
Tokenization powered by DeepSeek official tokenizer files.
configuration.endpoints.models.tokenCoun: Multiplier applied to the token count before returning it to VS Code.
configuration.endpoints.models.capabilit: Whether the model supports tool/function calling.
Whether the model supports image input.
Edit tool hint preset for VS Code / Copilot Chat.
configuration.endpoints.models.parallelT: Enable or disable parallel tool calling (unset for provider default).
configuration.endpoints.models.serviceTi: Let the provider auto-select the service tier.
Standard tier (maps to OpenAI "default" and Anthropic "standard_only").
Flex tier for OpenAI; Anthropic falls back to standard_only.
Scale tier for OpenAI; Anthropic falls back to standard_only.
Priority tier for OpenAI; Anthropic enables Fast mode.
Reasoning effort level (leave blank to let the provider decide).
Reasoning summary level for Responses-style APIs (leave blank to let the provider decide).
Let the provider choose the summary level automatically.
Reasoning effort level (leave blank to let the provider decide).
Reasoning summary level for Responses-style APIs (leave blank to let the provider decide).
Let the provider choose the summary level automatically.
configuration.endpoints.models.webSearch: Maximum number of web searches per request.
Only include results from these domains.
Never include results from these domains.
User location for localizing search results.
configuration.endpoints.models.extraHead: Extra headers to include in requests. Header values support `${APIKEY}` to reference the provider apiKey.
configuration.endpoints.models.extraBody: Extra body parameters to include in requests.
configuration.endpoints.models.presetTem: Preset templates exposed as per-model quick configuration options in VS Code.
Unique preset template ID used as the configuration key.
Template title shown in the VS Code model configuration UI.
Default preset ID used when the user has not selected a value.
Preset options available under this template.
Preset label shown in the VS Code model configuration UI.
Optional preset description shown in the VS Code model configuration UI.
Request-time model overrides applied when this preset is selected.
command.showUsageDashboard.title: Unify Chat Provider: Show Usage Statistics
command.clearUsageStats.title: Unify Chat Provider: Clear Usage Statistics
